pages.text:
INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

CONVENTION RELATING TO

INTERNATIONAL EXHIBITIONS AND THE

PROTOCOL TO AMEND THE 1928

CONVENTION RELATING TO

INTERNATIONAL EXHIBITIONS

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

CONVENTION RELATING TO INTERNATIONAL

EXHIBITIONS AND THE PROTOCOL REVISING THE

1928 CONVENTION RELATING TO

NTERNATIONAL EXHIBITIONS

WHEREAS the Convention Relating to International

Exhibitions was adopted in Paris on 22nd November, 1928;

AND WHEREAS the 1928 Convention was revised by the

Protocol of 16' November, 1966, 30" November, 1972 and amended on 24* June, 1982 and 315 May, 1972;

AND WHEREAS the Convention and the Protocol entered into force and are open for accession by any State;

NOW THEREFORE, 1, Hon. Raphael Tuju, EGH, MP,

Minister for Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya, declare that the Government of the Republic of Kenya, having considered the above mentioned Convention, accedes to the same and undertakes to fulfill in good faith all its obligations as stipulated in the Convention and the Protocol.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, this Instrument of Accession is hereby given under my name and the official seal of the

Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya.

DONE at NAIROBI this 9"

....day of. Novembel... Two

Thousand and Seven.

HON. RAPHAEL TUJU, EGH, MP

MINISTER FOR FOREIGN AFFAIRS OF

THE REPUBLIC OF KENYA
